title: lolium arundinaceum
intro: Lolium arundinaceum, also known as tall fescue, is a perennial grass species native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It is a cool-season grass that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lolium arundinaceum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system, as well as its use in treating various conditions such as fever, cough, and sore throat. Lolium arundinaceum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
